results.detail: RuntimeError: BTS pipeline violation in turn T-INCOMPLETE: expected BTS_TOOL_RESULT, got BTS_COMMIT
RuntimeError: BTS T1: subprocess failed (rc=0). stdout='' stderr=''

open_findings.finding: BTS v4 subprocess receipt executes arbitrary commands and currently bypasses Stage6B pre_tool_action_gate_v1 unless wrapped.
open_findings.required_fix: Route produce_tier1_subprocess_receipt through ToolCallEnvelope_v1 and PolicyDecision_v1 before subprocess.run.

open_findings.finding: BTS_TOOL_SWITCH can be emitted before BTS_TOOL_SELECTION; custom audit marked switch_before_selection_rejected as FAIL.
open_findings.required_fix: Enforce switch only after selection and before execution/result, or explicitly define allowable switch lifecycle.

open_findings.finding: BTS writes to _bts/ and bts/bts_log.ndjson; these are not yet registered as canonical OS receipt/ledger surfaces.
open_findings.required_fix: Install BTS path registry binding and include these paths in export/receipt manifests before canonical use.

open_findings.finding: No active invariant index file was found by *ACTIVE*INVARIANT* search in live root during Stage6C, despite Stage6B invariant files existing.
open_findings.required_fix: Before BTS install, resolve invariant activation/index path consistency and bind BTS_REQUIRED invariant through the actual activation engine.

open_findings.finding: Self-test uses temporary root and does not test live OS layout, Stage6B gate integration, export inclusion, or new-chat boot from exported ZIP.
open_findings.required_fix: Add live-root and fresh-extract fixture tests in install stage.

closed_findings.finding: Commit without BTS_TOOL_RESULT was rejected by pipeline violation during custom audit.
SHA chain was valid across generated log entries in custom chain test.
